title: Horror Cave Sounds
description: Pack changes all vanilla cave sounds into something actually scary
body: ![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fea069d8ae28ec12757df4d91193406cfe4e38dd.png) _Resource pack created for [Torment](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/torment) modpack_ # Showcase Video (not all sounds) # FEATURES _Pack changes all Cave Sounds into something actually scary._ _Sounds are muffled and reverbed._ _Works great with Sound Physics mod._
